
  // v_false_register - mutating
  public static func v_false_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    var value : Vx_Core.Type_boolean = c_false
    value.type_any.type_const = Vx_Core.v_const_new_from_namen("vx/core/false")
    value.booleann = false
    return value.type_any
  }
  public static let c_false : Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.v_boolean_constructor()
